lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: A great captain is always ready to change course.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Actions have consequences.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Can I have your teabag?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Can you stand me?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Have you found the key to the secret room?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I am the egg man, are you one of the egg men?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I believe that it is very rainy in Varrock.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I have a story about that.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I heard that the tall man fears only strong winds.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I quite fancy an onion.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: In Canifis the men are known for eating much spam.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: In the end, only the three-legged will survive.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: It is possible to commit no mistakes and still lose.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Loser says what.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: My magic carpet is full of eels.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Once, I was a poor man, but then I found a party hat.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Quickly! I've got a bee sticking out of my arm!

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: The slowest of fishermen catch the swiftest of fish.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: *sneezes* What?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: The sudden appearance of a deaf squirrel is most puzzling, comrade.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: There were three goblins in a bar, which one left first?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Up in the north, I hear they keep milk in bags rather than buckets.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Want to see me bend a spoon?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: What's cheese?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Would you like to buy a pewter spoon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

sections.title: Speaking with another player's Uri or with incorrect attire

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I do not believe we have any business, Comrade.

sections.title: Panic outside the Twilight Temple step additional dialogue

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: The puffins are up to something!

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: 9 years my princess, forever my light.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Ahhhhhh, leeches!

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: The Ankou's are a lie.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: (Breathing intensifies)

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Brother, do you even lift?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Connection lost. Please wait - attempting to reestablish.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Do you want ants? Because that's how you get ants.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Don't forget to find the jade monkey.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Fancy a holiday? I heard there was a whole other world to the west.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Guys, let's lake dive!

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I don't like pineapple, it has that bone in it.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I gave you what you needed; not what you think you needed.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I once named a duck after a girl. Big mistake, they all hated it.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I told him not to go near that fence, and what did he do? Sheesh....

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I took a college course in bowling; still not any good.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I'm going to get married, to the night.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: I'm looking for a girl named Molly. I can't seem to find her. any assistance?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Init doe. Lyk, I hope yer reward iz goodd aye?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Is that Deziree?

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: It is quite easy being green.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Mate, mate... I'm the best.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Mother's parsnips tasted like onion.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Oranges are the fruit of the vegetable.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Some say...

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: There's this guy I sit next to. Makes weird faces and sounds. Kind of an odd fellow.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: This is the last night you'll spend alone.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Tonight we dine................quite nicely actually.

lines.speaker: Uri
lines.text: Took a hair dryer to a party in my handbag. Ah, so fabulous!!
